/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-unused-function -Wno-attributes -Wno-unused-result -Wno-psabi -ffp-contract=off -fvisibility=hidden -fno-strict-aliasing -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/tester4advsimd.dir/tester4simd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tester4advsimd.dir/__/common/main_checkfeature.c.o ../common/CMakeFiles/testerutil_obj.dir/testerutil.c.o -o ../../bin/tester4advsimd   -L/home/chenxuqiang/install/lib  -L/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sleef/build/lib  -L/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sleef/build/src/common  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chenxuqiang/install/lib:/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sleef/build/lib:/data/chenxuqiang/eval_framework/sleef/build/src/common ../../lib/libsleef.a -ltlfloat
